description: Use this API to change the bus number of an existing bus in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = bus_number(ibus, newbus)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Current bus number of the bus for which the number is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newbus
parameters.description: New bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: bus number NEWBUS is already assigned to another bus.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - None.
